raw_response: {"remappings":[{"old_id":"interactive_global_map","new_id":"global_risk_map","reason":"Both describe the same interactive global map displaying traveler locations overlaid with destination risk ratings and threat alerts; extracted from different sections (SEC-03 vs SEC-15)."},{"old_id":"travel_insurance_verification","new_id":"travel_insurance_verification_service","reason":"Both describe the same SOW-configurable pre-trip service verifying traveler insurance coverage; extracted from SEC-15 (Appendix A) and SEC-03 (Section 3.3(d)) respectively."},{"old_id":"obligation_maintain_escalation_roster","new_id":"roster_maintenance_obligation","reason":"Both describe the same Client obligation to maintain the escalation roster and notify Direct Travel of changes within 5 business days; SEC-08 §8.2 explicitly cross-references Section 6.1 where roster_maintenance_obligation is defined."},{"old_id":"obligation_traveler_profile_completeness","new_id":"minimum_profile_data_obligation","reason":"Both describe the same Client obligation to ensure traveler profiles include minimum required data elements; SEC-08 §8.4 explicitly references Section 7.4 where minimum_profile_data_obligation is defined."},{"old_id":"obligation_data_protection_assessments","new_id":"lia_dpia_obligation","reason":"Both describe the same Client obligation to conduct and maintain DPIAs/LIAs for traveler tracking and location monitoring; SEC-08 §8.9 restates the obligation originally defined in SEC-07 §7.3(b)/7.6(c)."}]}

remappings.reason: Both describe the same interactive global map displaying traveler locations overlaid with destination risk ratings and threat alerts; extracted from different sections (SEC-03 vs SEC-15).
Both describe the same SOW-configurable pre-trip service verifying traveler insurance coverage; extracted from SEC-15 (Appendix A) and SEC-03 (Section 3.3(d)) respectively.

Both describe the same Client obligation to maintain the escalation roster and notify Direct Travel of changes within 5 business days; SEC-08 §8.2 explicitly cross-references Section 6.1 where roster_maintenance_obligation is defined.

Both describe the same Client obligation to ensure traveler profiles include minimum required data elements; SEC-08 §8.4 explicitly references Section 7.4 where minimum_profile_data_obligation is defined.

Both describe the same Client obligation to conduct and maintain DPIAs/LIAs for traveler tracking and location monitoring; SEC-08 §8.9 restates the obligation originally defined in SEC-07 §7.3(b)/7.6(c).
